question.label: Next-step focus
question.name: Given what we've covered, what would you want to tighten up first?
question.description: Closes by turning the discussion into a concrete near-term focus without introducing new topics.

answer: I want to start by pairing on my next ticket so I can see the approval bar in practice.

assessment.note: He names a concrete next step—pairing on the next ticket to see the approval bar in practice—which shows usable clarity and learning intent.

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
When feedback is specific and fast, I move much quicker.
I still feel fuzzy on where quality bars differ between quick fixes and core flows.
